## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes existing API or behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement

## Pillar(s) affected
- [ ] BMAD · [ ] Council · [ ] Miras · [ ] Karpathy · [ ] Wiki · [ ] LLM Client

## Checklist
- [ ] QA suite passes: `python scripts/qa_validate.py`
- [ ] New code has type hints
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated for public functions
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] If breaking change: major version bumped in `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] If new public API: marked `# BETA` if not yet stable

## Testing
Describe how you tested this change. Include relevant mock or live test output.
